story: Back in 2015–16 Hellen had an awkward crush on Henry that went nowhere. In January 2019 her math teacher switched seats and she landed next to Henry. He asked how she’d been, and they chatted before class most days. Actually, he was already dating Alexa from chorus. Chelsea kept saying the chatting meant he probably liked Hellen, and Hellen’s old crush came back. After a week of easy conversations, she started thinking about what to do after school.
implausible_knowledge: Actually, he was already dating Alexa from chorus.
question: After school, what will Hellen most plausibly do in response to the renewed crush and Chelsea’s hint?
answer_with_knowledge: Refrain from texting anything flirty and keep it strictly friendly in class.
answer_without_knowledge: Text Henry to see if he wants to hang out or study together.
